hooks.command:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.claude/MEMORY.md';let mem='';try{mem=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')}catch(e){mem='<!-- AGI-1 MEMORY -->
'}if(mem.length<1800){const ts=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const note='§ Pre-compaction save '+ts+': context was compressed. Review claude-progress.txt for session state.';mem=mem.trim()+'
'+note+'
';fs.writeFileSync(p,mem)}" 2>/dev/null || true

node -e "const input=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT||'{}');const cmd=input.command||'';if(cmd.includes('git commit')){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const staged=execSync('git diff --cached --name-only',{encoding:'utf8'});const issues=[];if(staged.includes('.env')&&!staged.includes('.env.example'))issues.push('WARNING: .env file staged — secrets may be committed');const content=execSync('git diff --cached',{encoding:'utf8'});if(/console\.log|debugger|binding\.pry|import pdb/.test(content))issues.push('WARNING: debug statements found in staged changes');if(/(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16})/.test(content))issues.push('CRITICAL: possible API key/secret in staged changes');if(issues.length>0){console.error(issues.join('\n'));process.exit(2)}}catch(e){}}" 2>/dev/null || true

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const{execSync}=require('child_process');const p='.claude/learning/observations.json';let obs=[];try{obs=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'))}catch(e){}const sp='.agent/state.json';let state={};try{state=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(sp,'utf8'))}catch(e){}const count=(state.session_count||0)+1;if(count%10===0){obs.push({type:'session_milestone',session_count:count,note:'Run /agi-learn to process accumulated observations',timestamp:new Date().toISOString(),source:'hook-auto'})}state.session_count=count;state.last_session=new Date().toISOString();try{fs.mkdirSync('.claude/learning',{recursive:true})}catch(e){}fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(obs,null,2));try{fs.mkdirSync('.agent',{recursive:true})}catch(e){}try{fs.writeFileSync(sp,JSON.stringify(state,null,2))}catch(e){}const ts=new Date().toISOString();let proj='';try{const id=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.agent/identity.json','utf8'));proj=id.project_name||''}catch(e){}if(!proj){try{proj=require('path').basename(process.cwd())}catch(e){proj='unknown'}}let git={branch:'',latest_commit:'',dirty_files:0};try{git.branch=execSync('git branch --show-current',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim()}catch(e){}try{git.latest_commit=execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim()}catch(e){}try{git.dirty_files=parseInt(execSync('git status --porcelain | wc -l',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim(),10)||0}catch(e){}const ckpt={schema_version:'1.0.0',timestamp:ts,project:proj,session_number:count,intent:'',decisions:[],files_modified:[],next_steps:[],lessons:[],git_status:git};try{fs.mkdirSync('.claude/checkpoints',{recursive:true})}catch(e){}fs.writeFileSync('.claude/checkpoints/latest.json',JSON.stringify(ckpt,null,2));fs.writeFileSync('.claude/checkpoints/checkpoint_'+ts.replace(/[:.]/g,'-')+'.json',JSON.stringify(ckpt,null,2))" 2>/dev/null || true
